description: Mycoplasma genitalium, translated natively from ccsb-scripps/MycoplasmaGenitalium (Maritan et al., JMB 2022). 552 interior + 130 surface species, VdW-surface meshed at LODs [16,8,4,1.5]. Sphere cell of radius 2000 Å with a genome-driven supercoiled chromosome (instanced dsDNA segments), bound RNA/DNA polymerases, and free + nascent mRNA.
name: mycoplasma_genitalium
